programme.title: The Murder Line
programme.desc: Canadian drama series. Flashbacks reveal how young Henry and Tommy met at a boxing gym, Erica's team make a grim discovery in the present, and Tommy makes a bold move.

programme.title: Shop on TV
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: The camp reaches breaking point when two celebrities explode during a trial. With the competition on a knife edge, discover who stays in the running and who leaves the show.

programme.title: The Murder Line
programme.desc: No Room at the No Tell Motel: Canadian drama series. Chaos unfolds as Henry realises that his family is in danger, and Miles and Ruby's drug operation takes a dangerous turn.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: News, current affairs and lively debate.

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: From refillable beauty buys to how you can add more wildlife into your garden this spring, Josie reports from our This Morning forest all morning for a World Earth Day special.

programme.title: ITV Lunchtime News
programme.desc: The latest headlines from around the world at lunchtime with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents, all of which are followed by a national weather forecast.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Nikki Fox, Robert Rinder, and Georgia Taylor all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: Bridlington plays host to the dealer's den. Alys Dobbie is dazzled by emeralds, and Tim Hogarth can't decide if he's discovered a masterpiece.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: The game of words hosted by Adil Ray - crossing words against the reigning Lingo champions this time are mother and daughter Valerie and Sarah and siblings Michael and Shanice.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as four strangers - Julia from Bath, Cavan from Slough, Lorraine from Bangor and John from Todmorden - come together in the hope of taking down a Chaser.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Party Election Broadcast: Liberal Democrats
programme.desc: A Party Election Broadcast on behalf of the Liberal Democrats.

programme.title: ITV Evening News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

programme.title: Celebrity Lingo
programme.desc: Adil Ray hosts the game of words as Drag Racers Tia Kofi and Danny Beard style it out against Dancing on Ice star Frankie Seaman and goalkeeping legend David Seaman for charity.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Charity's at risk despite giving birth successfully. Sarah and Jacob meet their baby. Doctor Todd learns a secret.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Will's mum blames Maggie for her son's ordeal, Carl seizes an opportunity to punish Theo, Jodie rumbles Olivia's game, and Carla and Lisa discover their wedding venue is flooded.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: As the show creeps to its conclusion, two more celebrities leave the African Savannah. A cruel trial leaves a campmate frustrated and close to yelling the fateful words.

programme.title: The Assembly
programme.desc: Aitch faces the grilling of a lifetime from autistic and learning-disabled interviewers. From his lyrics to his bank balance, nothing is off the table.

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Peston
programme.desc: Join Robert Peston for a late-night political magazine show featuring big interviews with the country's leading politicians, topical guests, and the best political gossip.

programme.title: The Murder Line
programme.desc: The final part of the Canadian drama series. Tensions explode at the Heron as an unexpected arrival leads to a deadly confrontation and Henry fights for control.

programme.title: Gallagher PREM Unleashed
programme.desc: Action from the 13th round of fixtures, featuring Bristol v Gloucester, Leicester v Newcastle, Exeter v Northampton, Bath v Harlequins and Sale v Saracens.

programme.title: Shop on TV
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Shoplifting: Are We Paying the Price? Tonight
programme.desc: After shoplifting reached a record high in 2025, Paul Brand investigates the high streets that are fighting back and the increase in prices we all end up paying.

programme.title: How to Clean Up for Cash
programme.desc: Josie and the team face their biggest challenge yet, secretly helping Ashley box up and value a room full to the brim with her mum Mandy's lifetime of auction bundle buys.

programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.desc: As the show creeps to its conclusion, two more celebrities leave the African Savannah. A cruel trial leaves a campmate frustrated and close to yelling the fateful words.

programme.desc: News, current affairs and lively debate.

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: Magazine show with news and topical items, celebrity guests, expert advice, real-life stories, competitions and a mix of cookery, health, beauty, lifestyle and more.

programme.desc: The latest headlines from around the world at lunchtime with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents, all of which are followed by a national weather forecast.

programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Charlie Hedges, Luke Kempner, and Jeremy Vine all trying to guess well-known phrases from animated clues.

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: Middlesbrough plays host to the dealer's den. Tony Geering's dancing on the table while an oboe is music to Corrie Jeffrey's ears.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: The fast-paced game of words hosted by Adil Ray - playing this time are the reigning Lingo champions alongside Daniella and Charlotte from London and Nathan and Aarati from Kent.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as four people who have never met before - Martin from Devon, Shameen from Manchester, Emma from Oswestry and Sam from the Wirral - unite to face a Chaser.

programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: ITV Evening News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

programme.title: Pet Stars: Can My Pet Pay My Bills? Tonight
programme.desc: ITV's Consumer Editor Chris Choi meets the pets and their owners striking it rich as they cash in on a booming billion-pound industry.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Dylan has a plan. Robert is guilty about Moira's situation.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Lisa takes action to ensure her wedding goes ahead, Debbie washes her hands of Carl, Todd prepares to leave for Thailand, and Jodie's efforts to gain Shona's sympathy backfire.
